description_long: This is a large, two-story suburban house set on a spacious green lawn, surrounded by landscaping elements such as trees, shrubs, and a paved driveway. The house features a prominent gable roof with dark shingles, multiple dormer windows, and a covered front porch supported by columns. The exterior is clad in a combination of light-colored siding and stone accents, giving it a Craftsman-inspired appearance. The property includes a detached garage, a backyard patio, a round above-ground pool, and a children's swing set. Tall, manicured trees line the driveway, and additional coniferous trees are placed around the yard for privacy and decoration. The windows are arranged in symmetrical rows, and the main entryway is accentuated by a covered porch with steps and decorative columns.
description: A large, two-story Craftsman-style house with a gable roof, covered porch, and landscaped yard featuring a driveway, garage, pool, and play area.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, covered porch, driveway, garage, and landscaped front yard with trees.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the house, the garage, backyard pool, and a row of tall trees along the driveway.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard patio, above-ground pool, swing set, and a single coniferous tree.
description_view_3: Angled front view emphasizing the driveway, main entrance, row of trees, and the pool and play area to the left.
attribute_entryway_design: Covered front porch with steps, decorative columns, and a central door
